mapper.select: SELECT * FROM mini_program_announcement WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM mini_program_announcement ORDER BY sort_order DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM mini_program_announcement WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mini_program_announcement (id, title, summary, body_html, published_at, enabled, sort_order, created_by) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{bodyHtml}, #{publishedAt}, IFNULL(#{enabled}, 1), IFNULL(#{sortOrder}, 0), #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE mini_program_announcement SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, body_html = #{bodyHtml}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, enabled = IFNULL(#{enabled}, 1), sort_order = IFNULL(#{sortOrder}, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
